title: Add barcode width settings to Label Settings tab
projectName: Make Some Double!! Barcode Label Printing

requirements.text: Add a barcode width input field to the Label Settings tab UI. The field should allow users to adjust the barcode width (in dots or appropriate unit consistent with existing settings). It must read from and write to the labelSettingsStore, be validated via barcodeSettingsValidation, and be reflected live in the LabelPreview component.

quotes: still missing barcode width settings in label settings tab.

acceptanceCriteria: A barcode width input control is visible in the Label Settings tab alongside other barcode layout settings.
Changing the barcode width value updates the labelSettingsStore state.
The barcode width value persists across page reloads via localStorage.
The LabelPreview component reflects the updated barcode width in real time.
Invalid barcode width values are caught by barcodeSettingsValidation and display a user-friendly error message.
The barcode width setting is included in label settings import/export (JSON serialization).
The CPCL generator uses the stored barcode width value when generating print commands.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Barcode width setting must be consistent with existing dot-based units used throughout the label settings system.
Validation must go through the existing barcodeSettingsValidation utility.
nonGoals: Do not add barcode height settings (not requested).
Do not change backend schema or Motoko actor for this feature.
Do not change the overall Label Settings tab layout beyond adding the new field.
